title: Bissop
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Species |image= |name=Bissop |designation=[[Sentience/Legends|Non-sentient]]''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' |class=[[Reptile/Legends|Lizard]]-[[Dog/Legends|hound]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Journey]]'' |subspecies= |races= |height= |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor= |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions=*Low-bodied *Long [[Nose/Legends|snouts]] *Used for tracking |lifespan= |origin= |habitat= |diet=[[Diet/Legends|Carnivorous]] |language= }} {{Quote|What manner of hunter hangs bells around the necks of his bissop pack?|Warrior [[Khalee Lah]], on [[Executor (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|Executor]] [[Nom Anor]]|}} '''Bissops''' were [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]] [[Reptile/Legends|lizard]]-[[Dog/Legends|hounds]] used by the sentient [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. [[Bioengineering/Legends|Bred]] by the Yuuzhan Vong to track and hunt living creatures, bissops were [[Diet/Legends|carnivorous]] and had [[Nose/Legends|snouts]] that they used to seek prey. During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], bissops were utilized by Yuuzhan Vong [[Warrior caste|warriors]] to track down both escaping [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]] and enemies who had infiltrated their territory on [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] such as [[Selvaris]] and [[Caluula/Legends|Caluula]]. Additionally, bissops were used to pull the sled of [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane]] in [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]], during a [[Grand Ceremony|ceremony]] on the planet [[Coruscant/Legends|Yuuzhan'tar]]. ==Biology and appearance== {{Quote|I vote for burning it. Otherwise the bissops might be able to sniff it out.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] comments on the bissop's good sense of smell|}} Resembling a [[Reptile/Legends|lizard]]-like [[Dog/Legends|hound]], bissops were [[Bioengineering/Legends|bred]] by the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Species/Legends|species]] for their hunting and tracking abilities.{{CSWECite|I|76|bissop}} Low-bodied and possessing long [[Nose/Legends|snouts]] that had a good sense of smell, bissops had [[Bone/Legends|skeletons]], as well as claws on their feet that left distinct tracks in dirt. The creatures had the body strength to be able to carry a grown Yuuzhan Vong in a [[Saddle/Legends|saddle]] on their backs, and were agile and fast. Because they were a Yuuzhan Vong-related life form, bissops were susceptible to the effects of the deadly [[Alpha Red (pathogen)|Alpha Red]] [[Disease/Legends|pathogen]]. ==Behavior== {{Quote|Bissops are trained to return to base.|[[Commando/Legends|Commando]] [[Judder Page/Legends|Judder Page]]|}} Classified as non-sentient, bissops sniffed both the ground and the [[Atmosphere/Legends|air]] when they were tracking something, and also brayed and howled when actively hunting a moving target. Carnivorous in [[Diet/Legends|diet]], bissops were docile enough for some Yuuzhan Vong to ride them with saddles, or for others to use them to pulls sled. However, if attacked by an enemy, bissops would race to strike at the attackers. The hounds were typically accompanied by Yuuzhan Vong minders while hunting, and usually hunted together in groups. Bissops were trained by their masters to return to a base camp if something happened to the rest of the hunting team. ==History== {{Quote|We found signs of a Yuuzhan Vong patrol-tracker beasts and a couple of those twelve-legged mounts.''"
"''Bissops and quenaks. We'd better get moving. The sooner we cross the next ridge, the better.|Commandos Judder Page and the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Sasso]]|}} [[File:TUF1_cover_JP.jpg|thumb|left|220px|Bissops were used to capture prisoners on Selvaris (pictured).]] Bred into existence by [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]], bissops were used by the Yuuzhan Vong during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], when the Yuuzhan Vong invaded a [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]] other than their [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|own]]. Typically accompanied by Yuuzhan Vong [[Warrior caste|warriors]] while on the hunt, bissops were used as hunters and trackers by the Yuuzhan Vong, and were utilized in the war effort. In [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' to [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]]. on the Yuuzhan Vong controlled [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Selvaris]], bissops stationed there were used in an attempt to [[Battle of Selvaris|capture]] escaped [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]] of war. The hounds were also used on the world of [[Coruscant/Legends|Yuuzhan'tar]], which had been [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|captured]] from the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. On Yuuzhan'tar, bissops were occasionally used to transport high-ranking Yuuzhan Vong in saddles, and it was there that a pack pulled the sled of [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane]] during a [[Grand Ceremony|ceremony]] at the [[Place of Sacrifice]]. Bissops were present on the Yuuzhan Vong–controlled world of [[Caluula/Legends|Caluula]], and three of the beasts accompanied a [[Squad/Legends|squad]] of warriors as they tracked a group from the New Republic across Caluula's surface in 29 ABY. However, as the entire Yuuzhan Vong hunting squad had been exposed to the Alpha Red pathogen and thus weakened by it, the New Republic group easily [[Death/Legends|killed]] the warriors and the bissops. ==Behind the scenes== Bissops were first mentioned in [[Elaine Cunningham]]'s novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Journey]]'', which was released in [[2002]] as an installment of [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']] series. The hounds later made their first appearance in ''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'', which was written by [[James Luceno]] and released in [[2003]] as the last book in ''The New Jedi Order'' series. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Journey]]'' {{1stm}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Bissop }} [[Category:Non-sentient species]] [[Category:Predatory creatures]] [[Category:Reptiles]] [[Category:Yuuzhan Vong creatures]]
